scripts.inspector:wx: cd your-mcp-skill/mcp-server && npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/inspector --transport stdio -- python -m openclaw_wechat_mcp
scripts.inspector:wx:no-profile: powershell -NoProfile -Command "cd your-mcp-skill/mcp-server; npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/inspector --transport stdio -- python -m openclaw_wechat_mcp"
scripts.inspector:xhs: cd xhs-mcp-skill/mcp-server && npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/inspector --transport stdio -- python -m openclaw_xhs_mcp
scripts.inspector:xhs:no-profile: powershell -NoProfile -Command "cd xhs-mcp-skill/mcp-server; npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/inspector --transport stdio -- python -m openclaw_xhs_mcp"
